summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of Zitex Website Builder iteration 16 — all 25 backend tests passed. Verified NEW features: (1) /wizard/steps PUBLIC endpoint works without auth, (2) Deep style_* steps appear after extras (style_whatsapp, style_scroll_top, style_book_float with 4 chips each including ai_custom), (3) /reorder-sections endpoint working, (4) /widget-ai-design with Emergent LLM generates valid CSS, (5) widget_styles persistence in apply_answer verified.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed projects during testing (cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 fully tested. Key NEW features verified: (1) GET /api/websites/wizard/steps is PUBLIC — returns 14+ steps without auth. (2) After answering 'extras' step with widgets like [whatsapp_float, scroll_top, book_float], dynamic style_* steps appear with 4 chips each (3 variants + ai_custom). (3) POST /reorder-sections accepts section_ids array and reorders sections correctly. (4) POST /widget-ai-design with Emergent LLM (gpt-4o-mini) generates valid CSS (~300 chars) with properties like width, height, border-radius, background gradient. (5) widget_styles.{widget}.variant persists correctly after answering style_* steps. (6) Snapshots grow after each wizard answer. (7) Category-specific images work: restaurant gets restaurant photos, plumbing gets plumbing photos, cosmetics gets cosmetics photos.

TestWidgetStylesPersistence (1 test) - PASSED: style_whatsapp='pill' persists to widget_styles

TestReorderSections (1 test) - PASSED: Sections reordered correctly
